subject: session date
fact: The session took place on May 9th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: May 9th, 2026

subject: Vraxen's Tower
fact: The party pressed their assault atop the dizzying heights of Vraxen's Tower.
source_quote: Atop the dizzying heights of Vraxen's Tower

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is a cunning wizard fighting the party on Vraxen's Tower.
source_quote: against the cunning wizard Veris

subject: Daein
fact: Daein loosed arrows at Veris but failed to find his mark.
source_quote: Daein loosed arrows at Veris but failed to find his mark

subject: Giant Owlbear
fact: A Giant Owlbear tore into the Stone Golem with savage fury.
source_quote: the Giant Owlbear tore into the Stone Golem with savage fury

subject: Stone Golem
fact: Veris's Stone Golem was present on the tower.
source_quote: his Stone Golem

subject: web conjuration
fact: Veris conjured a massive cube of thick, sticky webbing that ensnared several party members.
source_quote: Veris, desperate to regain control of the battlefield, conjured a massive cube of thick, sticky webbing that ensnared several of the party members

subject: fire bolt cast
fact: Veris hurled a bolt of fire at the Stone Golem.
source_quote: Veris then hurled a bolt of fire at the Stone Golem itself

subject: web burning
fact: The bolt of fire burned away the webs that had trapped the construct.
source_quote: burning away the webs that had trapped the construct

subject: Daein freed
fact: The fire freed the Stone Golem to pound Daein mercilessly.
source_quote: freeing it to pound Daein mercilessly

subject: Bramgrim healing
fact: Bramgrim called upon his divine gifts to mend Daein's wounds.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon his divine gifts to mend Daein's wounds

subject: Bramgrim freed
fact: Bramgrim freed himself from the clinging strands of webbing.
source_quote: and free himself from the clinging strands

subject: Felkur cannon fire
fact: Felkur unleashed a torrent of flame from his cannon.
source_quote: Felkur unleashed a torrent of flame from his cannon

subject: allies scorched
fact: Felkur's cannon blast scorched the webs and liberated his allies, though not without singeing Daein and the Owlbear.
source_quote: scorching the webs and liberating his allies, though not without singeing Daein and the Owlbear in the process

subject: webbing destroyed
fact: The webbing was reduced to ash.
source_quote: With the webbing reduced to ash

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas turned her fury on the Stone Golem.
source_quote: Akritas turned her fury on the Stone Golem

subject: Golem destroyed
fact: Akritas struck the Stone Golem until it finally crumbled into rubble.
source_quote: striking it again and again until the massive construct finally crumbled into rubble

subject: Wall of Force cast
fact: Veris conjured an invisible wall of pure magical force around Felkur.
source_quote: he conjured an invisible wall of pure magical force around Felkur

subject: Veris threat
fact: Veris declared with cold menace that there was no escape.
source_quote: declaring with cold menace that there was no escape

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: A Shield Guardian lumbered up the stairwell to reinforce the embattled wizard.
source_quote: a Shield Guardian lumbered up the stairwell to reinforce the embattled wizard

subject: stairwell
fact: The Shield Guardian came up the stairwell.
source_quote: lumbered up the stairwell

subject: demon approach
fact: The sound of demonic footsteps echoed from below.
source_quote: the sound of demonic footsteps echoed from below

subject: prison shattered
fact: Bramgrim shattered Veris's magical prison with a powerful dispelling.
source_quote: Bramgrim shattered Veris's magical prison with a powerful dispelling

subject: Veris slowed
fact: Daein's arrow found Veris at last, slowing the wizard's retreat.
source_quote: Daein's arrow found Veris at last, slowing the wizard's retreat

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur maneuvered his cannon down the chute toward Vraxen's precious library far below.
source_quote: Felkur, thinking ahead, maneuvered his cannon down the chute toward Vraxen's precious library far below

subject: cannon
fact: Felkur intended to detonate his cannon as a diversion.
source_quote: intending to detonate it as a diversion

subject: Vraxen's library
fact: The cannon was maneuvered toward Vraxen's precious library far below.
source_quote: toward Vraxen's precious library far below

subject: Shield Guardian thrown
fact: The Owlbear seized the moment to hurl the Shield Guardian to the ground.
source_quote: The Owlbear seized the moment to hurl the Shield Guardian to the ground

subject: Veris killed
fact: Akritas cut Veris down with a final volley of magically-laced thorns just before he could unleash a devastating burst of fire.
source_quote: Akritas, with a final volley of magically-laced thorns, cut Veris down just before he could unleash a devastating burst of fire upon the party

subject: Veris death confirmation
fact: Veris was dead.
source_quote: With Veris dead

subject: Golem destruction confirmation
fact: The Stone Golem was destroyed.
source_quote: and the Stone Golem destroyed

subject: Shield Guardian rise
fact: The Shield Guardian clambered back to its feet.
source_quote: which clambered back to its feet

subject: Shield Guardian attack
fact: The Shield Guardian swung at Bramgrim but missed entirely.
source_quote: swung at Bramgrim — only to miss entirely

subject: spiritual attack
fact: Bramgrim's protective spirits swarmed the construct and tore into it with ghostly fury.
source_quote: Bramgrim's protective spirits swarmed the construct as it moved, tearing into it with ghostly fury

subject: magical token
fact: The party scrambled to use one of Felkur's precious magical tokens.
source_quote: use one of Felkur's precious magical tokens

subject: barrier attempt
fact: The party attempted to conjure a barrier across the stairwell entrance.
source_quote: conjure a barrier across the stairwell entrance

subject: Mezzoloth
fact: A Mezzoloth burst onto the tower top before the barrier could be raised.
source_quote: a Mezzoloth — a fearsome demon clad in chitinous armor — burst onto the tower top

subject: poison gas exhaled
fact: The Mezzoloth immediately exhaled a billowing cloud of choking, poisonous gas that washed over the entire party.
source_quote: immediately exhaled a billowing cloud of choking, poisonous gas that washed over the entire party

subject: venom resistance
fact: Most of the adventurers managed to resist the worst of the venom.
source_quote: Most of the adventurers managed to resist the worst of the venom

subject: gas lingering
fact: The cloud of poisonous gas lingered, threatening to unravel Bramgrim's concentration.
source_quote: but the cloud lingered, threatening to unravel Bramgrim's concentration

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur apologized for potentially killing his allies with his cannon blast.
source_quote: "My bad, guys. I'm sorry if I kill you."

subject: software glitch
fact: The Roll20 interface entered a bizarre loop, scrolling endlessly left and locking the GM out of the map mid-combat.
source_quote: The Roll20 interface entered a bizarre loop, scrolling endlessly left and locking the GM out of the map mid-combat

subject: session halt
fact: The software glitch brought the session to a brief halt.
source_quote: bringing the session to a brief halt

subject: demon reinforcements
fact: A wave of demons is surging upward toward the tower.
source_quote: against the wave of demons surging upward

subject: Vraxen's Tower
fact: The party is engaged in combat atop Vraxen's Tower.
source_quote: The party continues their intense combat against Veris and a Stone Golem atop Vraxen's Tower

subject: Daein
fact: Daein attempts to snipe Veris with a longbow but misses both shots.
source_quote: Daein attempts to snipe Veris with a longbow but misses both shots

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur's manipulation of the teleport system has weakened the tower's protections.
source_quote: Felkur's manipulation of the teleport system has weakened the tower's protections

subject: teleportation anomaly
fact: Veris is able to teleport unexpectedly due to weakened tower protections.
source_quote: allowing Veris to teleport unexpectedly

subject: Veris
fact: Veris uses a legendary action to cast Web.
source_quote: Veris uses a legendary action to cast Web

fact: A 20-foot cube fills with sticky, flammable strands that restrain several party members.
source_quote: filling a 20-foot cube with sticky, flammable strands that restrain several party members

fact: The Giant Owlbear delivers a critical strike against the Stone Golem.

fact: Veris casts a firebolt at the Stone Golem.

fact: The firebolt burns away the webs restraining the Stone Golem.

fact: The Stone Golem attacks Daein with advantage.

subject: Stone Golem
fact: The Stone Golem unleashes a powerful pounding attack on Daein.

fact: Bramgrim uses divine magic to heal Daein.

fact: Bramgrim casts Freedom of Movement on himself.

fact: The flamethrower blast burns away the webs restraining the party.

fact: Daein is scorched by Felkur's cannon blast.

fact: The Giant Owlbear is scorched by Felkur's cannon blast.

fact: Veris moves across the battlefield to conjure a Wall of Force.

subject: Veris
fact: Veris declares to Felkur that there is no escape.

fact: Felkur considers dropping his cannon down the chute to detonate it.

fact: Bramgrim successfully casts Dispel Magic at a high level.

fact: Daein strikes Veris with a prepared bow shot.

fact: The bow shot slows Veris's movement.

fact: The Giant Owlbear shoves the Shield Guardian.

fact: The Shield Guardian is knocked prone.

subject: Felkur's magical token
fact: The party uses one of Felkur's magical tokens to conjure a Scroll of Wall of Force.

subject: Reinforcements blocked
fact: The Scroll of Wall of Force blocks incoming demonic reinforcements.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur moves his cannon down the passageway toward the library chute.

subject: Veris
fact: Veris unleashes a powerful firebolt at Akritas as a legendary action.

subject: Akritas
fact: The firebolt nearly incapacitates Akritas.
source_quote: nearly incapacitating the ranger

subject: Daein
fact: Daein uses a protective field to mitigate damage to Akritas.
source_quote: Daein uses a protective field to mitigate the damage dealt to Akritas

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas retaliates with her bow, striking Veris.

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas marks Veris with Hunter's Mark.
source_quote: and marking him with Hunter's Mark

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas finishes Veris off with a Hail of Thorns.
source_quote: Akritas finishes Veris off with a Hail of Thorns

subject: Veris killed
fact: Veris is killed before he can cast a fireball.

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: The Shield Guardian stands up and marches toward Bramgrim.
source_quote: The Shield Guardian stands up, marches toward Bramgrim

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: The Shield Guardian attempts to strike Bramgrim twice but misses both attacks.
source_quote: attempts to strike him twice but misses both attacks

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: The Shield Guardian moves to clear the stairwell entrance.
source_quote: The Shield Guardian moves to clear the stairwell entrance

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: The Shield Guardian takes damage from Bramgrim's Spirit Guardians.
source_quote: taking damage from Bramgrim's Spirit Guardians

subject: Mezzoloth
fact: A Mezzoloth emerges from the stairwell along with other demonic cannon fodder.
source_quote: A Mezzoloth emerges from the stairwell along with other demonic cannon fodder

subject: Mezzoloth
fact: The Mezzoloth takes damage from Bramgrim's Spirit Guardians as it enters the area.
source_quote: The Mezzoloth takes damage from Bramgrim's Spirit Guardians as it enters the area

subject: Mezzoloth
fact: The Mezzoloth immediately casts Cloudkill.
source_quote: The Mezzoloth immediately casts Cloudkill

subject: Cloudkill effect
fact: Cloudkill fills the area with a billowing cloud of poisonous gas.
source_quote: filling the area with a billowing cloud of poisonous gas

subject: Constitution saves
fact: The party must make Constitution saving throws against the gas.
source_quote: forcing the party to make Constitution saving throws

subject: Giant Owlbear
fact: The Giant Owlbear takes the full brunt of the poison damage.
source_quote: but the Owlbear takes the full brunt of the damage

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim struggles to maintain concentration on his Spirit Guardians.
source_quote: Bramgrim struggles to maintain concentration on his Spirit Guardians

subject: session pause
fact: The session pauses mid-round.
source_quote: The session pauses mid-round

subject: Wand of Web
fact: Veris uses the Wand of Web to conjure a massive 20-foot cube of sticky, flammable webbing.
source_quote: A magical item used by Veris to conjure a massive 20-foot cube of sticky, flammable webbing

subject: Felkur's Cannon
fact: Felkur uses his cannon to fire a flamethrower blast.
source_quote: An artificer's invention used by Felkur to fire a flamethrower blast

subject: Felkur's Cannon
fact: Felkur moves the cannon toward the library chute with the intention of detonating it as a diversion.
source_quote: Felkur also moved it toward the library chute with the intention of detonating it as a diversion to draw Vraxen away from the tower

subject: Special Orb
fact: The Special Orb grants a bonus to ability checks involving artificer abilities.
source_quote: An item previously stolen by Felkur that grants a bonus to ability checks involving artificer abilities

subject: Special Orb spell save DC
fact: The party determined the Special Orb does not affect spell save DC.
source_quote: ultimately determining it did not

subject: Scroll of Wall of Force
fact: A consumable token belonging to Felkur produced a Scroll of Wall of Force.
source_quote: A consumable token belonging to Felkur that, when used, produced a Scroll of Wall of Force

subject: demonic barrier creation
fact: The party used the token to create a barrier to block incoming demonic reinforcements from the stairwell.
source_quote: The party used it to create a barrier to block incoming demonic reinforcements from the stairwell

subject: Web spell casting
fact: Veris cast Web as a legendary action.
source_quote: Cast by Veris as a legendary action

subject: Web spell effect
fact: The Web spell conjured a 20-foot cube of sticky, flammable webbing that restrained party members within it.
source_quote: this spell conjured a 20-foot cube of sticky, flammable webbing that restrained party members within it

subject: Web spell combat effect
fact: The Web spell imposed disadvantage on attack rolls for restrained party members.
source_quote: imposed disadvantage on their attack rolls

subject: Web spell combat effect
fact: The Web spell granted advantage to attackers targeting restrained party members.
source_quote: and granted advantage to attackers targeting them

subject: Firebolt targeting Stone Golem
fact: Veris used Firebolt to target the Stone Golem and burn away the webs restraining it.
source_quote: Used by Veris to target the Stone Golem and burn away the webs restraining it

subject: Firebolt legendary action
fact: Veris used Firebolt as a legendary action to deal heavy damage to Akritas.
source_quote: and later used as a legendary action to deal heavy damage to Akritas

subject: Spirit Guardians maintenance
fact: Bramgrim maintained Spirit Guardians as a concentration spell throughout the battle.
source_quote: A concentration spell maintained by Bramgrim throughout the battle

subject: Spirit Guardians damage effect
fact: Spirit Guardians created a protective aura of spirits that damaged the Stone Golem, Shield Guardian, and Mezzoloth as they moved through the area.
source_quote: creating a protective aura of spirits that damaged the Stone Golem, Shield Guardian, and Mezzoloth as they moved through the area

subject: Spirit Guardians speed reduction
fact: Spirit Guardians reduced the Stone Golem's speed on a failed saving throw.
source_quote: and reduced the Stone Golem's speed on a failed saving throw

subject: Freedom of Movement casting
fact: Bramgrim cast Freedom of Movement on himself.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim on himself

subject: Freedom of Movement effect
fact: Freedom of Movement allowed Bramgrim to move freely through the magical webs without being restrained.
source_quote: allowing him to move freely through the magical webs without being restrained

subject: Mass Healing Word casting
fact: Bramgrim used Mass Healing Word as a bonus action to restore health to Daein.
source_quote: A bonus action spell used by Bramgrim to restore health to Daein during the heat of battle

subject: Mass Healing Word result
fact: Mass Healing Word returned 17 hit points to Daein.
source_quote: returning 17 hit points

subject: Wall of Force casting
fact: Veris cast Wall of Force to create an invisible, physical barrier to isolate Felkur.
source_quote: Cast by Veris to create an invisible, physical barrier to isolate Felkur

subject: Wall of Force declaration
fact: Veris declared there was no escape after casting Wall of Force.
source_quote: declaring there was no escape

subject: Wall of Force dispelling
fact: Bramgrim successfully dispelled the Wall of Force.
source_quote: It was later successfully dispelled by Bramgrim

subject: Greater Invisibility on Felkur
fact: Greater Invisibility was an active spell on Felkur that allowed him to remain hidden while utilizing his cannon.
source_quote: An active spell on Felkur that allowed him to remain hidden while utilizing his cannon

subject: GM ruling on Felkur
fact: The GM ruled that Felkur could use his cannon and remain invisible.
source_quote: The GM ruled that Felkur could use his cannon and remain invisible

subject: Dispel Magic casting
fact: Bramgrim cast Dispel Magic at fifth level.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim at fifth level

subject: Dispel Magic effect
fact: Dispel Magic automatically shattered Veris's Wall of Force.
source_quote: to automatically shatter Veris's Wall of Force

subject: Dispel Magic result
fact: Dispel Magic freed the party to strike back at the wizard.
source_quote: freeing the party to strike back at the wizard

subject: Hail of Thorns casting
fact: Akritas cast Hail of Thorns as a bonus action at third level.
source_quote: Cast by Akritas as a bonus action at third level

subject: Hail of Thorns effect
fact: Hail of Thorns turned Akritas's arrow into a burst of magical thorns that rained down on Veris.
source_quote: turning her arrow into a burst of magical thorns that rained down on Veris

subject: Veris death
fact: Hail of Thorns ultimately killed Veris before he could unleash a fireball.
source_quote: and ultimately killed him before he could unleash a fireball

subject: Cloudkill casting
fact: The Mezzoloth cast Cloudkill upon entering the battlefield.
source_quote: Cast by the Mezzoloth upon entering the battlefield

subject: Cloudkill effect
fact: Cloudkill conjured a billowing cloud of poisonous gas that forced the party to make Constitution saving throws or take heavy poison damage.
source_quote: conjuring a billowing cloud of poisonous gas that forced the party to make Constitution saving throws or take heavy poison damage

subject: Cloudkill persistence
fact: The Cloudkill cloud persists and threatens the party's concentration spells each round.
source_quote: The cloud persists and threatens the party's concentration spells each round
